case_title: BRAD DRIAN et al VS. WILLIAM PATTON et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR HEARING OF MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM FORFEITURE, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT PATTON, WILLIAM JR

DEFENDANT WAS ALSO ORDERED TO PAY FEES AND COSTS ($1,847.50) AND RENT (JANUARY THRU JULY) IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,162.78. TOTAL AMOUNT TO BE PAID: $7,010.28. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J.
